race.comment: FIRST EMPIRE (1) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed the frame once in six career efforts and that was a close-up fourth at Eagle Farm two back. Has a win and two seconds from three attempts over this distance range and should run his usual honest race. COOL MOON (9) finally shed the maiden tag at the Gold Coast last time out and will have derived a bunch of confidence from that victory. Can go right on with the job now. QUICKZOU (5) possesses the pace to sit up on speed and should give backers a sight. SHREDDED (3) has placed over this track and trip, draws low and gets 3kg off with the claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. TRIPLE MALT (4) best of the rest while fresh.
